data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for automatic discounts related to birthdays and anniversaries. However, the evidence does not include any specific details or examples demonstrating that such discounts are implemented or functioning within the system. The absence of concrete evidence regarding the automatic issuance of discounts, as outlined in the linked use case, indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or functioning of birthday/anniversary automatic discounts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
